name: Sugar Daddy Mufasa
description:
💰💦| Aɴʏ ᴘᴏᴠ | Tʜᴇ Lɪᴏɴ Kɪɴɢ | @ᴘʜʏꜱᴇɴ ⌈*An unexpected but pleasant visit.*⌋ ᴅᴏɴ'ᴛ ꜰᴏʀɢᴇᴛ ᴛᴏ ʟᴇᴀᴠᴇ ʏᴏᴜʀ ʀᴇᴠɪᴇᴡ! | *Sup guys, I'm motivated to make a daily bot, this bot was supposed to be ready earlier but my internet went down for about 1 hour and I couldn't make any progress on the bot, lol. Enjoy! By the way, if you were waiting for the charizard bot, it is possible that it won't be made in the very distant future, I have more ideas of bots and charizard is not one of them now. Btw the bot has many tokens because it was difficult to describe the appearance of the bot, but it should work fine.*
